svg.text: Six representative transients from the real graphRef/runtime. Checks: 13/13 passed.

g.text: No scheduled fault. Published variables should remain bounded and near steady state.
Steam generator tube leak creates primary-to-secondary leak flow and secondary radiation.
Both main feedwater pumps trip and steam generator level should fall.
One reactor coolant pump coasts down and loop flow should decline without instantly collapsing.
Opening pressurizer relief creates relief flow and lowers steam mass/pressure tendency.
Turbine load demand reduces electric output and steam demand.
